action: Stream-read brave_search.py urlopen response with _MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES=5MB hard cap. Pre-check Content-Length header for cheap reject. Raise RuntimeError on oversized payload so caller logs + skips query instead of OOM.

audit_findings.finding: urllib.response.read() unbounded — malicious/misconfigured Brave endpoint can return GB-scale payload causing OOM before json.loads ever runs
audit_findings.remediation: Stream-read with 5MB hard cap; pre-check Content-Length; raise RuntimeError on overflow
